title: Revise a product QBR into a tighter executive version
prompt: Revise this deck into a 6-slide executive version. Keep the core quarter narrative, but remove repetition, tighten the recommendations, and make the deck easier for a leadership readout.
acceptanceNotes: The revision should preserve the quarter story while compressing it.
It should not reset into a completely new deck concept.
The output should feel edited, not regenerated from scratch.
